case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. BERNARD J. VASH

docket_entries.description: REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR NOV-23-2015 - ***CASE IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.*** BRANDON TANG APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT BERNARD VASH APPEARING AS SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT IN THIS MATTER. THE COURT ORDERED THE CASE DIMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REPRESENTATION OF PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
